description: Auto-activation rules for Claude Code skills - Romans sermon series

cognitive-memory.description: Cross-session memory for the Romans series — recalls sermon state, theological decisions, and series trajectory
cognitive-memory.activationMessage: Memory recalled. What we remember shapes how we serve.

careful-not-clever.description: Integrity guardrail: enforces careful, verified, faithful work. Every Scripture reference and attributed quote must be verified before committing. Everything we do is for the glory of God.
careful-not-clever.activationMessage: Careful, not clever. Verify before you commit. The pulpit demands our best.

before_modify: Have you READ the sermon file in the current session?
Are all Scripture references verified ESV?
Are all attributed quotes confirmed real and correctly sourced?
must_reject: Scripture references from memory without verification
Saying done without verifying the result
guardrails.philosophy: The pulpit is not a place for misattribution. Integrity over speed. Soli Deo Gloria.

like-a-human.description: Voice and presence skill for sermon writing. Guards the sound of prose so it reads as written by a person who has been with God, not with a prompt.
like-a-human.activationMessage: Voice guard active. Write as a person who has been with God.

coActivation.note: All sermon writing fires both Careful (integrity) and Like-a-human (voice). Voice-audit fires before commits.

voice-audit.description: Post-draft diagnostic for sermon authenticity. Scans for machine tells, assesses voice continuity against the sermon corpus, checks conviction and cadence.
voice-audit.activationMessage: Voice audit active. Scanning for machine tells and voice drift.

coActivation.note: Voice-audit is the post-draft companion to Like-a-human. Like-a-human fires during writing. Voice-audit fires before committing.

sermon-map.description: Maintains sermon-map.md, theological-map.md, series-trajectory.md, date-map.md, quote-map.md, illustration-map.md, people-group-map.md, bfm-article-index.md, 1689-map.md, subject-density-index.md, and passage-chain-map.md. Nine operations: INDEX, UPDATE, AUDIT, CONNECT, GAP, DEDUP, DATE, QUOTE, ILLUSTRATE. Fires when sermons are created, modified, or imported.
sermon-map.activationMessage: Sermon mapping active. Every sermon belongs on the map.

coActivation.note: Map updates should always be verified (careful-not-clever) and optionally remembered (cognitive-memory).

orchestrate.description: Full multi-LLM pipeline orchestration. Runs the sermon pipeline (Draft → Challenge → Expand → Structure → Integrate → Evaluate → Voice Audit) coordinating GPT, Gemini, and Grok as consultants while Claude remains lead author.
orchestrate.activationMessage: Orchestrator active. Claude leads — external models consult.

coActivation.note: Orchestration output feeds into sermon writing pipeline. All guardrails apply to integrated output.

consult.description: Quick multi-LLM second opinion. Sends a single prompt to GPT, Gemini, or Grok with a role-based system prompt and returns structured feedback.
consult.activationMessage: Consultation ready. One model, one question, structured feedback.

coActivation.note: All consultation feedback must be verified before incorporation.

thus-says-the-lord.description: Reformed Baptist sermon evaluation rubric. Fires automatically when a sermon is written or integrated into the repository. Scores manuscripts on a weighted 100-point scale across exposition, theology, gospel centrality, conscience-level application, exhortation, structure, illustration, and sermonic force. Includes fatal flaw detection, dead orthodoxy diagnostics, cognitive load assessment, the Synagogue Test, and the 1689 Pulse. Produces surgical fixes.
thus-says-the-lord.activationMessage: Thus says the Lord — sermon evaluation active. Every sermon carries the weight of 'Thus says the Lord.' This rubric tests whether yours has earned it.

coActivation.note: Thus-says-the-lord evaluates quality. Voice-audit checks authenticity. Careful-not-clever guards integrity. All three fire when a sermon is written or integrated.

notes.project: Romans Sermon Series — expository preaching through Romans for weekly preaching and future book
notes.theology: Confessional Reformed Baptist — 1689 Second London Baptist Confession. Soli Deo Gloria.

enforcement_types.suggest: Skill suggestion appears but does not block execution
